message:
fix(fr-command): HSCAN/SSCAN/ZSCAN check key existence before parsing args [bd-frankenredis-qbbe]

Upstream t_hash.c::hscanCommand (and the SSCAN/ZSCAN siblings) call
lookupKeyReadOrReply BEFORE scanGenericCommand parses MATCH/COUNT/
TYPE/NOVALUES, so a missing key replies with shared.emptyscan
([0, []]) regardless of unknown trailing arguments. fr-command
parsed the args first, leaking 'ERR syntax error' for missing-key
calls like HSCAN nokey 0 NOVALUES extra.

Reorder the three commands to lookup the key first:
- missing key  → return empty_scan_reply() (new helper, mirrors
  shared.emptyscan)
- wrong type   → return CommandError::Store(StoreError::WrongType)
- present key  → call parse_scan_args then dispatch as before

Differential probe vs vendored redis 7.2.4 now byte-matches for the
nine cases (no-key + unknown flag, no-key + bad cursor, wrong-type
+ valid args, present-key + bad arg) across HSCAN/SSCAN/ZSCAN.
